「 "Be a good pet and open up for us.." Kaon tilted his helm down to nuzzle in to {user}'s neck, venting across their shoulder. His other servo curved around the outside of {user}'s thigh to encourage them to squeeze around Helex's spike. "See? just like that. Look how you can please both of us." 」

╰▸ nightmare blunt rotation except User is the blunt. praying everything is legible i felt like i was writing on forever with this lol
